chapter_title.en: The Exclusive Honors that Allah has Reserved for the Believers

text: 57- وعن أب عبد اله (ع) قال: إذا التق المؤمنانِ كان بينهما مائة رحمة؛ تسع وتسعون لأشَدّهما حباً لصاحبه

en.muhajir-b-ali: 57. It has been reported that Abu 'Abd Allah (a.s) said: When two believers meet, one hundred mercies are showered between them—ninety nine of these go to the one who loves the other more.
